message:
fix: extract JWT claims from nested OpenAI namespace objects (#6)

OpenAI/Codex JWT tokens nest identity claims like chatgpt_plan_type and
user_id under the "https://api.openai.com/auth" namespace key rather
than placing them at the top level. The pickString and extractEmailClaim
functions only checked top-level claims, causing plan_type to always
show "unknown" for Codex profiles.

Changes:
- Add collectClaimMaps() helper that returns both the top-level claims
  map and any nested namespace maps (https://api.openai.com/auth,
  https://api.openai.com/profile)
- Update pickString() and extractEmailClaim() to search all claim maps,
  with top-level claims taking precedence over nested ones
- Add "chatgpt_plan_type" to the PlanType candidate key list
- Add test fixture codex_openai_nested_claims.json with real OpenAI JWT
  structure
- Add 4 new tests covering nested claim extraction, nested email, and
  top-level-takes-precedence semantics

Closes #6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
